scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (codesnippets, messages, rules, sequences, meetingtypes). Mixmax's write endpoints (message send, sequence enrollment) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: sequence enrollment not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
message send not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
live feed events not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
authenticated-user profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
